-- DDL generated by DBeaver
-- WARNING: It may differ from actual native database DDL
CREATE TABLE dbkernel.tb_prd_produtos (
	prd_id int(11) NULL,
	prd_cod varchar(50) NULL,
	prd_gtin_ean varchar(14) NULL,
	prd_descricao varchar(255) NULL,
	prd_un_compra varchar(10) NULL,
	prd_un_venda varchar(10) NULL,
	prd_preco_compra decimal(18,4) NULL,
	prd_margem_venda decimal(10,2) NULL,
	prd_preco_venda decimal(18,4) NULL,
	prd_ativo char(1) NULL,
	prd_data_criacao timestamp NULL
)
ENGINE=InnoDB
DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
